name: smart-claude-memory-mcp
description: Sovereign memory protocol for Claude Code — typed, dual-scope, observability-grade. Backed by a plain PostgreSQL 17 + pgvector datastore; the plugin handles the rest.
author: NABILNET.AI <https://nabilnet.ai>

scripts.build: npm run lint:boundaries && tsc && npm run copy:gui
scripts.test: node --import tsx --experimental-test-module-mocks --no-warnings --test tests/trajectory-stripper.test.ts tests/trajectory-summarizer.test.ts tests/trajectory-daemon.test.ts tests/health.test.ts tests/migrations.test.ts tests/list-global-patterns.test.ts tests/capabilities.test.ts tests/orchestrator.test.ts tests/checkpoint.test.ts tests/curriculum-scanner.test.ts tests/curriculum-consumer.test.ts tests/prune.test.ts tests/graduation-handlers.test.ts tests/graduation-scanner.test.ts tests/graduation-daemon.test.ts tests/gui.test.ts tests/gui-graph.test.ts tests/kg.test.ts tests/graph-extractor.test.ts tests/graph-daemon.test.ts tests/search-graph-rag.test.ts tests/clustering-kmeans.test.ts tests/clustering-louvain.test.ts tests/clustering-daemon.test.ts tests/clustering-delta-gate.test.ts tests/clustering-routes.test.ts tests/gui-backlog.test.ts tests/file-watcher-daemon.test.ts tests/global-vault.test.ts tests/budget-gate.test.ts tests/web-fetch.test.ts tests/links.test.ts tests/robots.test.ts tests/crawl.test.ts tests/graph-sanitize.test.ts tests/config-rerank.test.ts tests/bridge-concepts.test.ts tests/bridge-fetch.test.ts tests/rerank.test.ts tests/search-rerank.test.ts tests/llm-rerank.test.ts tests/metrics.test.ts tests/gui-open-marker.test.ts tests/kg-upsert-from-chunk.test.ts tests/pg-adapter.test.ts tests/successful-chunks-view.test.ts
